prompt: Should our mid-size SaaS company expand into the Japanese enterprise market, and what entry strategy would minimize risk while maximizing first-mover advantage?
We are a European electric vehicle battery manufacturer considering entering the North American market. What partnerships, regulatory, and supply chain factors should guide our market entry?
Our fintech startup has gained traction in Southeast Asia. Should we enter the Indian market next, or focus on deepening penetration in existing markets?
A boutique consulting firm wants to expand from the UK into the Middle East. What cultural, regulatory, and competitive factors should shape the entry plan?
Our agricultural technology platform is considering launching in sub-Saharan Africa. What infrastructure, distribution, and partnership strategies should we prioritize?
Should our $500M revenue healthcare company acquire a smaller telehealth startup valued at $80M, or build equivalent capabilities in-house over 18 months?
We are evaluating the acquisition of a competitor that would give us 35% market share. What antitrust, integration, and retention risks should we model?

A private equity firm is considering a roll-up strategy in the fragmented pest control industry. What valuation multiples, synergy assumptions, and integration playbook should guide the first three acquisitions?
Our enterprise software company has been approached by a larger competitor for acquisition at 8x revenue. Should we accept, counter, or remain independent?
We need to divest a underperforming division that accounts for 20% of revenue but consumes 35% of management attention. What divestiture strategy maximizes enterprise value?
Our B2B SaaS product currently uses per-seat pricing. Should we switch to usage-based pricing, and how should we manage the transition without churning existing customers?
We are launching a premium tier of our consumer subscription service. How should we price it relative to the existing $9.99/month plan to maximize ARPU without cannibalizing the base?
Our commodity chemical business is losing margin due to price wars. Should we pursue a cost leadership strategy or differentiate into specialty chemicals with higher margins?
We operate a two-sided marketplace. How should we balance take rates between buyers and sellers when sellers have multiple alternative platforms?
Our professional services firm charges hourly rates. Should we transition to value-based pricing for our top 20% of engagements, and what change management approach is needed?
Our traditional media company generates 80% of revenue from advertising. Should we pivot to a subscription-first model, and what timeline and milestones should we set?
We are a hardware manufacturer considering a shift to hardware-as-a-service. What are the financial implications for cash flow, and how do we manage the transition period?

Our retail chain is evaluating whether to close 40% of physical stores and shift to an online-first model with selective showrooms. What customer, operational, and financial factors should drive this decision?
A traditional bank is considering launching a standalone neobank brand targeting Gen Z. Should it be a separate entity or integrated with the parent brand?
Our logistics company currently owns its fleet. Should we transition to an asset-light model using independent contractors, and what quality/compliance risks does this introduce?
